TextView.android:text:
Mental Peace & Meditation

1. Deep Breathing
Focus on your breath to calm the nervous system.

2. Body Scan
Slowly focus on relaxing each part of your body.

3. Mindful Observation
Pick an object and focus on it for a few minutes.

4. Guided Imagery
Visualize a peaceful place to reduce anxiety.

5. Loving-Kindness
Direct positive thoughts toward yourself and others.

6. Zen Meditation
Sit in silence and observe thoughts without judgment.

7. Walking Meditation
Pay attention to the sensation of your feet on the ground.

8. Mantra Meditation
Repeat a calming word or sound to stay focused.

9. Progressive Relaxation
Tense and release muscle groups to shed stress.

10. Digital Detox
Turn off all screens to allow your mind to rest.
